title: NHS 111: urgent but not life-threatening help
content: NHS 111 (call 111 or use 111.nhs.uk) is for urgent medical problems when it is not a 999 emergency and you are not sure what to do. 111 can assess symptoms, give advice, book an urgent care or GP slot, arrange a call-back from a nurse or clinician, or direct you to the right service. It is available 24/7. Use it for out-of-hours needs and when a GP appointment is not available in time.
